unsupported_features.comment: DOM mutation order — pipeline routes through <page> root, producing different mutation sequences
Lynx environment does not provide MutationObserver

tests: should not render falsy values
should render NaN as text content
should clear falsy attributes
should not render falsy attributes on hydrate
skip_list.comment: JSON.stringify(NaN) → null — NaN is lost in BSI→patch IPC serialization

tests: should render bigint as text content
skip_list.comment: JSON.stringify(BigInt) throws — BigInt cannot cross BSI→patch IPC boundary

tests: should serialize object props as attributes
skip_list.comment: JSON.stringify strips custom toString() — object identity lost in IPC serialization

tests: should keep c.base up to date if a nested child component changes DOM nodes
should not update sibling c.base if child component changes DOM nodes
should not update parent c.base if child component changes DOM nodes and it is not first child component
should update parent c.base if child component changes DOM nodes and it is first non-null child component
should not update parent c.base if child component changes DOM nodes and a parent is not first child component
should update parent c.base if first child becomes null
should update parent c.base if first child becomes non-null
should update parent c.base if first non-null child becomes null with multiple null siblings
should update parent c.base if a null child returns DOM with multiple null siblings
should update parent c.base to null if last child becomes null
should update parent c.base if last child returns dom
should not update parent if it is a DOM node
skip_list.comment: component.base returns BSI (background thread), not a DOM node

tests: should clear falsy input values
should set enumerable boolean attribute
should allow setting contentEditable to false
should not clear falsy DOM properties
should mask value on password input elements
should allow <input list /> to pass through as an attribute
should not throw when changing contentEditable to undefined or null
should support subsequent renders w/ defaultValue
should support subsequent renders w/ defaultChecked
skip_list.comment: Web DOM IDL properties (value, checked, contentEditable, spellcheck, …) — Preact does dom[prop]=val but BSI has no IDL property, causing a different code path in setProperty()

tests: should set checked attribute on custom elements without checked property
should support false aria-* attributes
should re-render nested components
skip_list.comment: Boolean-to-attribute serialization convention (true→'' vs 'true', false→remove vs 'false') — web-specific behavior not relevant to Lynx Element PAPI

tests: should not execute append operation when child is at last
should always diff `checked` and `value` properties against the DOM
skip_list.comment: Refs return BSI, not DOM node — tests call ref.focus(), ref.value, etc.

tests: should accurately call nested setState callbacks
skip_list.comment: Pipeline timing — componentDidMount reads scratch before pipeline syncs output to container

tests: should reconcile mutated DOM attributes
should remove attributes on pre-existing DOM
permanent_skip_list.comment: Test mutates or pre-populates jsdom directly — BSI has no access to main-thread DOM state

tests: should support the <template> tag
permanent_skip_list.comment: BSI has no .content DocumentFragment — web-specific <template> API

tests: should reorder Fragment children
permanent_skip_list.comment: BSI .type field collision — type set as JS property instead of setAttribute, breaking diff

tests: handle shuffled (stress test)
permanent_skip_list.comment: Exceeds 5s timeout due to pipeline overhead per commit
